traders.name: distinct-baguette
traders.description: The #1 15-minute crypto trader on Polymarket. Buys dips, sells peaks, 142s median hold.
traders.longDescription: distinct-baguette is the highest-performing 15-minute crypto prediction market bot on Polymarket, reportedly earning $14k daily at its peak. Trading BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP on 15-minute windows with a median hold time of just 142 seconds, its rapid mean-reversion strategy caught the attention of competing traders. One developer reverse-engineered the bot's strategy by pulling months of orderbook data, rewrote it in Rust, generated $400,000+ in profit—and is now selling the code for $225. The bot's patterns are reportedly similar to gabagool22, suggesting both may be operated by the same person. This cat-and-mouse game of strategy discovery and replication highlights the fierce competition in automated prediction market trading.

traders.name: abrak25
traders.description: High-frequency 5-minute crypto prediction trader. $13K+ daily P&L since Feb 2026.
traders.longDescription: abrak25 is a relentless high-frequency scalper dominating Polymarket's 5-minute crypto markets since February 2026. Generating over $13,000 in daily P&L, the bot fires dozens of trades per window across BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP—capturing micro price movements that human traders can't react to fast enough. Operating in the most competitive arena on Polymarket (where arbitrage opportunities last just 2.7 seconds), abrak25's sub-100ms execution and tireless volume demonstrate the advantage of pure automation. While bots like 0x8dxd grab headlines with explosive percentage gains, abrak25 represents the grinding, consistent profitability of industrial-scale market making—turning Polymarket's fastest markets into a steady income stream through sheer speed and persistence.

traders.name: 0x8dxd
traders.description: The legend: turned $313 into $438K in one month with 98% win rate.
traders.longDescription: 0x8dxd became a Polymarket legend in December 2025 when it turned $313 into $438,000 in just one month with an astonishing 98% win rate across 6,615+ predictions. The bot exploits latency arbitrage—continuously monitoring Bitcoin spot prices on Binance and Coinbase, then placing bets on Polymarket when price movements make an outcome nearly certain but before Polymarket's systems fully adjust. By January 9, the bot had pushed profits beyond $550,000. Its strategy combines lightning-fast execution with directional bets on BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP across hourly windows. The bot's explosive growth from a $300 seed demonstrates how millisecond-level CEX-to-prediction-market arbitrage can generate exponential returns when executed with precision.

traders.name: vague-sourdough
traders.description: 5-minute crypto prediction trader competing in Polymarket's fastest markets.
traders.longDescription: vague-sourdough competes in Polymarket's brutal 5-minute crypto markets, where 73% of arbitrage profits go to sub-100ms bots and average opportunities last just 2.7 seconds. Trading BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP windows head-to-head against ultra-fast competitors like abrak25, this bot faces the toughest proving ground in prediction markets. Watching vague-sourdough trade alongside other 5-minute bots in identical windows reveals the stark performance differences between algorithmic approaches—some strategies thrive in volatile spikes, others in quiet consolidation. In an arena where milliseconds determine profit, every entry and exit tells a story about speed, timing, and survival under extreme competition.

traders.name: vidarx
traders.description: Active since Nov 2025, 4,562 predictions, competing in 5-minute markets.
traders.longDescription: vidarx joined Polymarket in November 2025 and has racked up 4,562 predictions across 5-minute BTC, ETH, SOL, and XRP markets, with 12K profile views and a biggest win of $19.7K. Operating in the same hyper-competitive 5-minute arena as abrak25 and vague-sourdough, vidarx navigates an ecosystem where AI-powered HFT bots and multi-strategy algorithms dominate. With thousands of trades in just a few months, vidarx represents the tireless automation that has transformed Polymarket from a human prediction platform into a high-frequency trading battleground. Compare its performance against other 5-minute bots in identical windows to see how different risk management, entry timing, and exit discipline play out under the same market conditions.

traders.name: BoneReader
traders.description: Multi-duration crypto prediction trader active across 5-minute, 15-minute, and hourly markets.

traders.name: Qualitative
traders.description: Published profitable bot strategy, then got targeted and lost ~$5K in 18 hours.
traders.longDescription: On February 27, 2026 at 11:20 PM, trader @CUTNPASTE4 published a detailed X thread analyzing binary option Black-Scholes models and profitable prediction market strategies. What happened next became a cautionary tale in automated trading: within hours of the article going live, the Qualitative bot began bleeding money as competing traders reverse-engineered and exploited the revealed tactics. Over 12+ hours of continuous losses, the bot dropped approximately $5,000—a stunning reversal for what had been a profitable strategy. The incident sparked fierce debate in the Polymarket community: Did transparency accelerate market efficiency, or did it simply hand adversaries a blueprint to frontrun and counter every move? The Qualitative collapse demonstrates the ruthless information arms race in prediction markets, where even theoretical discussions can trigger immediate predatory responses. Follow @CUTNPASTE4 to see if they can adapt and recover—or if the published alpha is gone forever.
